heading: Meet our team
subheading: Students managing hardware, software, and designing robots .

groupPhoto.alt: Tolland County Titans #23535 Team Group Photograph

roster.name: Alex Smith
roster.bio: Specializes in drivetrain geometry, custom gearbox assembly, and localized structural stress analysis under competition load profiles.

roster.name: Sarah Jenkins
roster.bio: Develops vision tracking pipelines using OpenCV and optimizes pathing calculations utilizing dead-reckoning sensor arrays.

roster.name: Michael Chang
roster.bio: Manages rapid prototyping workflows including 3D printing components and drafting part models inside corporate CAD environments.

roster.name: Emily Rodriguez
roster.bio: Coordinates public engineering demonstrations, manages budget resource vectors, and structures documentation for the engineering portfolio.
